summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Solaris Films website iteration 3. All new features working correctly: alternating light/dark sections on homepage, new Guida Tecnica page, new Privacy Policy page, updated navigation with Guida Tecnica link, footer with Privacy Policy link, header CTA icons (cyan phone, green WhatsApp). All 14 backend tests passed. No LCD Switch or Fotocromatiche found anywhere on the site.
critical_code_review_comments: All light sections (Services, Process, CaseStudy, Testimonials) have proper dark text contrast
New pages (GuidaTecnicaPagina, PrivacyPolicyPagina) have proper data-testid attributes
Header CTA icons correctly styled: cyan for phone, green (#25D366) for WhatsApp
No LCD Switch or Fotocromatiche mentions found on any page
seed_data_creation: Test data created during API tests with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features tested and working: Homepage alternating backgrounds (Services/Process/CaseStudy/Testimonials on light #F1F5F9, FocusTecnici/LoSapeviChe/Gallery/References on dark), new /guida-tecnica page with 5 sections (cosa-sono, antisolari, sicurezza, safety-shield, privacy) with alternating backgrounds, new /privacy-policy page with 8 legal sections, navigation includes Guida Tecnica, footer includes Privacy Policy link, header CTAs have cyan phone and green WhatsApp icons. All existing pages still render correctly: /, /servizi, /chi-siamo, /blog, /contatti, /preventivo. Gallery lightbox and FAQ accordion working. No LCD/Fotocromatiche anywhere.

homepage_alternating_backgrounds.details: Services (section-light), FocusTecnici (dark), Process (section-light), LoSapeviChe (dark), CaseStudy (section-light), Gallery (dark), References (dark), Testimonials (section-light)

guida_tecnica_page.details: New page at /guida-tecnica renders with tech specs bar (light), 5 content sections with alternating backgrounds: cosa-sono (dark), antisolari (light), sicurezza (dark), safety-shield (light), privacy (dark)

privacy_policy_page.details: New page at /privacy-policy renders with 8 legal sections: Titolare del Trattamento, Tipologie di Dati, Finalità, Base Giuridica, Modalità, Conservazione, Diritti, Cookie

navigation_guida_tecnica.details: Navigation includes 'Guida Tecnica' link with data-testid='nav-guida-tecnica'

footer_privacy_policy.details: Footer includes Privacy Policy link at /privacy-policy

header_cta_icons.details: Phone icon has cyan styling (cyan-400), WhatsApp icon has green styling (#25D366)

no_lcd_fotocromatiche.details: No LCD Switch or Fotocromatiche found on any page (homepage, servizi, chi-siamo, blog, contatti, preventivo, guida-tecnica, privacy-policy)

gallery_lightbox.details: Gallery lightbox opens and closes correctly

faq_accordion.details: FAQ accordion expands and collapses correctly

light_section_text_contrast.details: Light sections have readable dark text (titles in #0A0F1C, body text in #475569/#64748B)
